title: Totem of Pukeko
description: Replaces Totem of Undying with Pukeko.
body:
Replaces Totem of Undying with Totem of Pukeko and adds "DAMN!!!!!!" sound layer to the activation sound. It's as simple as that.

![Totem of Pukeko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b964619005da857d99f94fa4890b3376c2041185.png)

_da creature !!!!!!!_

![REINCARNATION!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aoseDjn7/images/6416b94cef327feaefca50ad7bd334f24fdc4720.webp)

_THE DAMN BROTHERS !!!!!!!_
